subject: Project update
snippet:
Hi John,

Wanted to give you a quick status update on the Q3 rollout. We finishe...
body:
Hi John,

Wanted to give you a quick status update on the Q3 rollout. We finished the data migration ahead of schedule and QA has signed off on the first two modules. The only outstanding item is the vendor integration, which is tracking about a week behind.

Let me know if you want to sync before Friday's steering committee meeting.

Amara

subject: Re: Project update
snippet:
Hi Amara,

Thanks for the update, great to hear QA is ahead of schedule. A week'...
body:
Hi Amara,

Thanks for the update, great to hear QA is ahead of schedule. A week's delay on the vendor integration shouldn't be a problem as long as we flag it in Friday's meeting so no one is surprised.

Can you send me the vendor's revised timeline before then? I'll add a slide summarizing where we stand.

John

subject: Team meeting Thursday
snippet:
Hi John,

I'm putting together the agenda for Thursday's team meeting. So far I ...
body:
Hi John,

I'm putting together the agenda for Thursday's team meeting. So far I have: project status recap, resourcing for next sprint, and open Q&A. Anything you'd like to add?

Also, do you want to lead the resourcing discussion since you've been coordinating with the contractors?

Amara

subject: Re: Team meeting Thursday
snippet:
Hi Amara,

That agenda looks good. Can we also add a short item on the training ...
body:
Hi Amara,

That agenda looks good. Can we also add a short item on the training rollout timeline? A few people have asked when they need to complete it by.

Happy to lead the resourcing discussion, I'll have a slide ready.

John

subject: Re: Team meeting Thursday
snippet: Sounds good, I'll add the training item right after resourcing. Meeting is at 2p...
body:
Sounds good, I'll add the training item right after resourcing. Meeting is at 2pm in the usual room, should run about 45 minutes.

See you Thursday.

Amara

subject: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: Hey John, how's the prep going for your 1:1 with your manager tomorrow? Did you ...
body:
Hey John, how's the prep going for your 1:1 with your manager tomorrow? Did you write down the points about the promotion timeline you mentioned last week?

Just want to make sure you don't forget to bring it up like last time.

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: I started a list actually. Promotion timeline, the vendor integration delay, and...
body:
I started a list actually. Promotion timeline, the vendor integration delay, and asking for headcount for next quarter. I think that's a solid set of talking points.

Do you think I should mention the extra hours I've been putting in, or does that come off as complaining?

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: I don't think it's complaining if you frame it around impact, like "I put in ext...
body:
I don't think it's complaining if you frame it around impact, like "I put in extra time to hit the migration deadline early." That shows initiative rather than venting.

Also don't forget to actually ask about the promotion timeline directly, don't just hint at it.

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: Good point, I'll phrase it that way. Thanks for the pep talk, I feel more prepar...
body:
Good point, I'll phrase it that way. Thanks for the pep talk, I feel more prepared now.

I'll let you know how it goes tomorrow night.

subject: Training reminder
snippet: Hey, did you get the email about the mandatory compliance training? It says it's...
body:
Hey, did you get the email about the mandatory compliance training? It says it's due by end of month and you still show as not started on the portal.

Just a heads up since you mentioned forgetting last year until the deadline.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Ugh, I completely forgot about that. Thanks for the reminder. I'll block off an ...
body:
Ugh, I completely forgot about that. Thanks for the reminder. I'll block off an hour this week to knock it out.

How long did yours take you at the clinic?

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Mine took about 90 minutes including the quiz at the end. There were a couple mo...
body:
Mine took about 90 minutes including the quiz at the end. There were a couple modules on data privacy that dragged a bit.

Just don't leave it to the last day, the portal tends to crash when everyone logs in at once.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Good to know, I'll try to do it Wednesday during lunch before it gets busy. Than...
body: Good to know, I'll try to do it Wednesday during lunch before it gets busy. Thanks again for flagging it, I really would have missed the deadline otherwise.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: No problem, that's what I'm here for. Let me know once you've finished so I can ...
body: No problem, that's what I'm here for. Let me know once you've finished so I can stop bugging you about it.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Hey, my afternoon appointments got moved around so I actually have a free lunch ...
body:
Hey, my afternoon appointments got moved around so I actually have a free lunch on Wednesday. Want to grab something near your office?

That new sandwich place opened up on 5th, I've been wanting to try it.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Wednesday works for me, my calendar is clear around noon. Let's do the sandwich ...
body:
Wednesday works for me, my calendar is clear around noon. Let's do the sandwich place, I've heard good things too.

I'll meet you there at 12:15?

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Feels like we haven't just sat down and talked in a while with everything going ...
body:
Feels like we haven't just sat down and talked in a while with everything going on. Want to grab coffee next Tuesday morning before work?

The place near the kids' school opens at 7.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: I'd like that, it has been a busy few weeks. Tuesday morning works, I don't have...
body:
I'd like that, it has been a busy few weeks. Tuesday morning works, I don't have anything until 9.

Want me to drop the kids off after so we're not rushing?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: That would be perfect, one less thing to juggle. I'll see you there at 7, save m...
body:
That would be perfect, one less thing to juggle. I'll see you there at 7, save me a seat by the window if you get there first.

Looking forward to it.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: I was thinking for my mom's birthday brunch we do the botanical garden cafe agai...
body:
I was thinking for my mom's birthday brunch we do the botanical garden cafe again since she loved it last year. Want to help me figure out the guest list?

I'm thinking her sister, our kids, and maybe the Reddys since they're close with her.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: That cafe was a great choice last time, good call. I think the guest list sounds...
body:
That cafe was a great choice last time, good call. I think the guest list sounds right, though we should double check if the Reddys are traveling that weekend.

Do you want me to handle the reservation and cake order?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Yes please, that would help a lot. Get the same cake from the bakery downtown if...
body:
Yes please, that would help a lot. Get the same cake from the bakery downtown if they still have that vanilla chai flavor she liked.

I'll text the Reddys today to confirm their schedule.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: On it, I'll call the bakery this afternoon and lock in the reservation for 11am....
body:
On it, I'll call the bakery this afternoon and lock in the reservation for 11am. Should be a nice morning for her.

Let me know what the Reddys say.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: The home security service sent us renewal options before the contract expires ne...
body:
The home security service sent us renewal options before the contract expires next month. There's the basic plan we have now, a mid-tier with outdoor cameras, and a premium with monitoring plus cameras.

What do you think, is it worth upgrading?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: I've actually wanted outdoor cameras since the package thefts on our street last...
body:
I've actually wanted outdoor cameras since the package thefts on our street last year. The mid-tier seems like a reasonable middle ground price-wise.

Do you know how much more it is per month compared to what we're paying now?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: It's about $15 more a month for the mid-tier, so roughly $180 more a year. The p...
body:
It's about $15 more a month for the mid-tier, so roughly $180 more a year. The premium jumps up another $25 on top of that for the monitoring service.

I think mid-tier is worth it, we don't really need full monitoring.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Agreed, let's go with mid-tier then. The extra $15 a month is worth it for peace...
body:
Agreed, let's go with mid-tier then. The extra $15 a month is worth it for peace of mind about the porch.

Do you want to call them or should I? I don't mind handling the renewal call.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Go ahead and call, you're better at negotiating these things anyway. See if they...
body:
Go ahead and call, you're better at negotiating these things anyway. See if they'll throw in free installation for the cameras since we're renewing.

Thanks for handling it.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Did you see the invoice from the landscaping company? It's $80 more than what th...
body:
Did you see the invoice from the landscaping company? It's $80 more than what they quoted us last month. Not sure if that's a mistake or if they added something.

Can you give them a call when you get a chance?

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I noticed that too, I think it might be the extra mulch delivery they did withou...
body:
I noticed that too, I think it might be the extra mulch delivery they did without confirming with us first. I'll call them tomorrow morning and get it sorted out.

I'll let you know what they say.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: The rental office sent the lease renewal for the investment property. They're of...
body:
The rental office sent the lease renewal for the investment property. They're offering a 12-month at a 4% increase or a 6-month at an 8% increase. Current tenants seem happy so I'm leaning toward the 12-month.

What do you think?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: 12-month makes sense to me too, especially since they've paid on time every mont...
body:
12-month makes sense to me too, especially since they've paid on time every month. Less turnover risk is worth more than the extra couple percent on the 6-month.

Should we ask if they'd consider a slightly lower increase for locking in a full year?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Worth asking, the worst they can say is no. I'll email the office and propose 3%...
body:
Worth asking, the worst they can say is no. I'll email the office and propose 3% for 12 months and see how they respond.

I'll cc you on it so you're in the loop.

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: This week's roundup: a good piece on managing screen time for kids, a recipe for...
body:
This week's roundup: a good piece on managing screen time for kids, a recipe for that instant pot chicken we've been meaning to try, and an article on refinancing rates dropping slightly.

Thought the refinancing one might actually be relevant for us.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Good catch on the refinancing article, rates have been creeping down the last fe...
body:
Good catch on the refinancing article, rates have been creeping down the last few weeks. Might be worth calling the bank to see what they'd offer us.

Also yes, let's try that chicken recipe this weekend.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: I'll grab the ingredients for the chicken when I do groceries tomorrow. And I'll...
body:
I'll grab the ingredients for the chicken when I do groceries tomorrow. And I'll look up our current rate so we have something to compare against before calling the bank.

Saving both links for reference.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Sounds like a plan. I'll try to call the bank Thursday during my lunch break and...
body:
Sounds like a plan. I'll try to call the bank Thursday during my lunch break and see what options they mention.

Thanks for pulling these together every week, I never have time to read the news myself.

subject: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Quick check on this week's pickup schedule. I have a late patient appointment We...
body:
Quick check on this week's pickup schedule. I have a late patient appointment Wednesday so I can't get Maya from soccer practice. Can you cover that one?

Everything else should be normal I think.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Yeah I can cover Wednesday, practice ends at 5:30 right? I'll leave the office a...
body:
Yeah I can cover Wednesday, practice ends at 5:30 right? I'll leave the office a bit early.

What about Friday, do we still have the dentist appointment for Arjun?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Yes, 5:30 for soccer, thank you. And yes Arjun's dentist appointment is Friday a...
body:
Yes, 5:30 for soccer, thank you. And yes Arjun's dentist appointment is Friday at 4, I can take him to that one since I'm off early that day.

So just Wednesday soccer is the only swap needed.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Got it, Wednesday soccer is on me. I'll set a reminder on my phone so I don't lo...
body:
Got it, Wednesday soccer is on me. I'll set a reminder on my phone so I don't lose track of time at work.

Anything else changing for Thursday or Monday?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Nope, Monday and Thursday stay as usual, I've got those. Thanks for covering Wed...
body:
Nope, Monday and Thursday stay as usual, I've got those. Thanks for covering Wednesday, it really helps since I can't reschedule that patient.

I'll text you a reminder that morning anyway just in case.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: I started looking at flights for the summer trip, prices seem to be lowest if we...
body:
I started looking at flights for the summer trip, prices seem to be lowest if we leave on a Tuesday instead of the weekend. Also found a rental with a pool the kids would love.

Can you check if you can get that week off work?

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Tuesday departure works better for my schedule anyway, easier to wrap things up ...
body:
Tuesday departure works better for my schedule anyway, easier to wrap things up Monday before leaving. I'll request the time off tomorrow.

That rental with the pool sounds great, send me the listing and I'll take a look tonight.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: What are we thinking for this weekend? I was hoping to finally get to that farme...
body:
What are we thinking for this weekend? I was hoping to finally get to that farmers market Saturday morning before it gets too hot, and maybe just stay in Sunday.

The kids have been asking to go back too.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Farmers market sounds good, we can grab breakfast there like last time. Sunday s...
body:
Farmers market sounds good, we can grab breakfast there like last time. Sunday staying in works for me too, I could use a slow day honestly.

Should we invite your sister to the market or keep it just us this time?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Let's keep it just us and the kids this time, it's been a while since we've had ...
body:
Let's keep it just us and the kids this time, it's been a while since we've had a quiet morning together. We can invite her next time.

I'll set an alarm so we actually get there early before the crowds.

subject: ABEM ConCert study plan — Rosh Review block
snippet: Amara — pulled the sepsis and airway question sets for tonight's study group. Ri...
body:
Amara — pulled the sepsis and airway question sets for tonight's study group. Riverside at 6, I'll bring the POCUS cases. Currently at 68%, need to close on the airway module.

(ref 1)

snippet: Draft 3 of the POCUS paper is in Drive. I tightened the methods section; can you...
